title: Finout Scan Recommendation
description: A CostGuard scan recommendation response containing identified resources, cost analysis, waste metrics, and potential savings for cloud optimization.

requestId.description: The ID of this specific request.

scanLastRunTime.description: The last time the scan was run.

scanTotalCost.description: The sum of resources cost identified by the scan during the analysis days.

scanTotalWaste.description: Waste of the scan during the analysis days.

scanYearlyPotentialSavings.description: Yearly potential savings for the scan based on the scan's total waste.

resources.description: Resources identified in the scan with optimization recommendations.
